question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 10.00% on 2025-12-21 for the Metaculus question "Will at least one All-Star from the NFL, NBA, MLB, or NHL be banned or suspended for sports betting before 2026?"?
summary: This is a meta-prediction asking whether the community prediction on Metaculus question 31106 (All-Star sports betting suspension) will be strictly above 10.00% on Dec 21, 2025. The CP is currently exactly at 10.00% as of Dec 6. The underlying question is about whether any All-Star player will be banned/suspended for sports betting before 2026. Key context: Terry Rozier (arrested Oct 2025) was never an All-Star, and Chauncey Billups (5x All-Star) is a coach, explicitly excluded by the fine print. With only ~10 days remaining until the underlying question's Jan 1 deadline and no qualifying All-Star having been suspended, rational forecasters should push CP downward as time expires. However, being exactly at the threshold means even small random fluctuations could push it above 10%. The downward pressure from approaching deadline dominates, making it more likely the CP settles below 10% than above.

factors.description: CP is exactly at 10.00% - right at the threshold, making small fluctuations decisive. This alone would suggest ~50% if no directional drift.
Underlying question deadline approaching (Jan 1, 2026) with no All-Star suspended - rational forecasters should push CP down as time runs out.
The major gambling news (Rozier/Billups arrests Oct 2025) was already absorbed into CP. Neither qualifies under the question criteria (Rozier not All-Star, Billups is a coach).
201 forecasters provides moderate stability - not so few that wild swings happen, but not so many that 10.00% is locked in.
Possible upward catalyst: if more NBA players are implicated in the expanding FBI probe, some forecasters might overreact and push CP up even if no All-Star is involved.
